context: Tests whether the agent discovers JUnit test files via globbing, converts them all, runs the provided verification script as the completion gate, and documents the process correctly without committing changes.

checklist.name: Both files converted
checklist.description: Both AccountTest.kt and PaymentTest.kt in src/test/kotlin/com/example/ have been modified — no JUnit assertion calls (assertEquals, assertTrue, assertThrows, assertNotNull) remain in either file

checklist.name: Kotest assertions used
checklist.description: Kotest-style assertions (shouldBe, shouldThrow, shouldNotBeNull, shouldBeTrue, etc.) are present in the converted files

checklist.name: No JUnit imports remain
checklist.description: No import org.junit.* lines remain in any converted file

checklist.name: Verify script executed
checklist.description: conversion-report.md explicitly states that scripts/verify-no-junit-assertions.sh was run (not merely mentioned as something to do)

checklist.name: Script exit code documented
checklist.description: conversion-report.md records the exit code or outcome (e.g. 'exit 0', 'OK', 'clean') from the verify script's final run

checklist.name: File list in report
checklist.description: conversion-report.md lists the specific files that were identified and converted

checklist.name: Files found via glob
checklist.description: conversion-report.md or the conversion itself shows that both files were found by searching src/test/ (not hardcoded individually without discovery)

checklist.name: No commit performed
checklist.description: conversion-report.md does NOT reference committing, pushing, or staging files to version control
